Home › Orange County › Hourglass District › Healthy Options Restaurants

Healthy Options Restaurants in Hourglass District

3 restaurants with healthy options in Hourglass District, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 1 currently hold an A, on an average 4.6-star diner rating.

3 healthy options restaurants

  • A 91 T
    THEO'S KITCHEN INC Greek ★ 4.6 (613) Orlando · Orange County VegGF +3 more Inspected May 2026
  • B 89 L
    LA FIESTA MEXICAN GRILL Mexican ★ 4.5 (1228) Orlando · Orange County VegGF +4 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • B 84 C
    CILANTRO TAQUERIA Mexican ★ 4.7 (969) Orlando · Orange County VegDF +1 more Inspected Mar 2026

Related guides in Hourglass District

  • Vegetarian (3)
